layer1.name: Physical Space Layer
layer1.description: Collects data from physical entities and executes actions

attacks.name: Data Tampering Attacks
attacks.description: Attackers forge, modify, replace, or remove gathered data. They may inject noise or jamming during data collection.

attacks.name: Software (SW) Attacks
attacks.description: Exploit vulnerabilities in proprietary or third-party software components on physical devices.

attacks.name: Threats of Physical Damage
attacks.description: Physical access attacks: probe attacks, material removal, circuit manipulation, clock glitching.

attacks.name: Threats on Extracting Sensitive Data
attacks.description: Adversaries access collected data to extract credentials or security parameters.
cascade_effects: Layer 2: Stolen credentials enable further attacks

attacks.name: Denial of Service (DoS)
attacks.description: Exhaust resources of physical devices through flooding, jamming, or DDoS attacks.

attacks.name: Sybil Attacks
attacks.description: Attackers use multiple fake identities to deceive during P2P communications.

attacks.name: Eavesdropping Attacks
attacks.description: Attackers secretly listen to P2P communications to capture sensitive information.

attacks.name: Objective Replication Attacks
attacks.description: Add physically unauthorized objects into PS to inject malicious information.

attacks.name: Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) Attacks
attacks.description: Intercept and modify transmitted data during P2P communications.

attacks.name: Impersonation Attacks
attacks.description: Assume legitimate identity during data acquisition to extract credentials.

attacks.name: Threats on Low-Quality Data
attacks.description: Intentionally share low-quality data to undermine DS accuracy.

attacks.name: Threats on Unreliable Data
attacks.description: Data from unauthenticated sources cannot be trusted.

layer2.name: Intermediate Layer
layer2.description: Synchronizes data between PS and DS, stores aggregated data, performs analysis and prediction

attacks.name: Software (SW) Attacks
attacks.description: Compromise software components used for modeling and analyzing collected data.

attacks.name: Threats of Privacy Leakage
attacks.description: Privacy information exposed during analysis of collected data.
cascade_effects: Layer 1: Physical harm from exposed data

attacks.name: Model Inconsistency Attacks
attacks.description: Model parameters tampered with by malicious server and distributed.

attacks.name: Model Poisoning Attacks
attacks.description: Alter trained gradients or model parameters to degrade analysis performance.

attacks.name: Software (SW) Attacks (Storage)
attacks.description: Exploit vulnerabilities in data aggregation software.

attacks.name: Threats on Malicious Data Storage
attacks.description: Install fake storage servers to capture transmitted data.

attacks.name: Threats of Gathering Sensitive Data
attacks.description: Collect sensitive data during P2D communications for misuse.

attacks.name: Threats of Physical Damage
attacks.description: Physically damage data storage servers.

attacks.name: Data Tampering Attacks
attacks.description: Tamper with stored data affecting VR generation.

attacks.name: Threats of Unauthorized Data Access
attacks.description: Unauthorized access to data storage servers.

attacks.name: Threats of Privacy Leakage (Storage)
attacks.description: Privacy data disclosed during aggregation.

attacks.name: Threats of Data Misuse
attacks.description: Data illegally sold or revealed by authorized entities.

attacks.name: Threats on Unreliable Data
attacks.description: Cannot verify source of data in storage.

attacks.name: Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) Attacks
attacks.description: Intercept and modify synchronization data between PS and DS.

attacks.name: Denial of Service (DoS)
attacks.description: Flood synchronization channel to disrupt normal operations.

attacks.name: Communication Poisoning Attacks
attacks.description: Inject poisoned data during synchronization.

attacks.name: Threats on Low-Quality Data
attacks.description: Deliberately use low-quality data during synchronization.

attacks.name: Threats on Desynchronization
attacks.description: Modify synchronization frequency to compromise consistency.
cascade_effects: Layer 1: PS out of sync with DS

attacks.name: Eavesdropping Attacks
attacks.description: Overhear transmitted information during synchronization.

attacks.name: Software (SW) Attacks
attacks.description: Compromise decision-making software from DS.

layer3.name: Digital Space Layer
layer3.description: Visualizes VRs, monitors status, enables D2D communication among VRs

attacks.name: Software (SW) Attacks
attacks.description: Exploit vulnerabilities in visualization and modeling software.

attacks.name: Threats on Privilege Escalation
attacks.description: Gain administrator access to visualization software.

attacks.name: Threats on Malicious Virtual Resources
attacks.description: Generate fake VRs or clone legitimate VRs.

attacks.name: Threats of Gathering Sensitive Data
attacks.description: Clone legitimate VRs to collect sensitive data.

attacks.name: Data Tampering Attacks
attacks.description: Forge, modify, or remove VRs.

attacks.name: Denial of Service (DoS)
attacks.description: Deploy virtual counterfeit servers to exhaust resources.

attacks.name: Threats of Privacy Leakage
attacks.description: Access existing VRs containing sensitive data.

attacks.name: Visualization Tampering Attacks
attacks.description: Manipulate HMI settings to alter VR visualization.

attacks.name: Threats on VR's Ownership Provenance
attacks.description: Difficulty establishing ownership of VRs.

attacks.name: Model Inconsistency Attacks
attacks.description: Distribute malicious model parameters to other VRs.

attacks.name: Model Poisoning Attacks
attacks.description: Compromise model parameters by injecting malicious data.

attacks.name: Threats on Free-Riding
attacks.description: VRs consume services without contributing.

attacks.name: Threats on Extracting Sensitive Data
attacks.description: Acquire security-critical information during monitoring.

attacks.name: Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) Attacks
attacks.description: Intercept D2D communications between VRs.

attacks.name: Sybil Attacks
attacks.description: Generate fake identities to deceive other VRs.

attacks.name: Threats on Low-Quality Data
attacks.description: Intentionally share low-quality data during D2D communication.

attacks.name: Threats on Desynchronization
attacks.description: Maliciously demand frequent synchronization.

attacks.name: Communication Poisoning Attacks
attacks.description: Inject poisoned data during D2D communications.

attacks.name: Threats of Unauthorized Data Access
attacks.description: Illegally access transmitted data during D2D sync.

attacks.name: Eavesdropping Attacks
attacks.description: Exploit insecure D2D communication channels.

attacks.name: Impersonation Attacks
attacks.description: Exploit legitimate VR identifications for D2D comms.
